packages.desc: Automatically organizes photos and videos into dated folders (YYYY/MM) by reading EXIF metadata. Designed for Synology DS216play running DSM 7.
packages.changelog: ### Added - GPG-signed SPK (`syno_signature.asc`): packages are now signed with the project's   GPG key so they appear and can be installed directly from DSM Package Center via the
